name: BuySphere
description: A scalable and feature-rich e-commerce platform designed to streamline online shopping experiences for both customers and vendors, offering secure transactions, product management, and analytics.

name: OAuthBridge
description: A universal authentication system that simplifies secure user login and authorization across multiple platforms, supporting OAuth standards and seamless integration with third-party services.

name: django-chat-system
description: A real-time messaging application built with Django, enabling instant communication, group chats, and robust user management for modern web platforms.

name: game_hub
description: A dynamic web application developed with TypeScript, serving as a central hub for discovering, reviewing, and sharing games, complete with user profiles and interactive features.

name: house-price-prediction-ml
description: A machine learning project in Python that leverages advanced algorithms to accurately predict house prices based on historical data and key market indicators.

name: Orvexa
description: A JavaScript-based project focused on delivering innovative web solutions, featuring modular architecture and modern UI/UX best practices.

name: news_share_app
description: A cross-platform news sharing application built with Dart, enabling users to post, share, and discuss news articles in real time with a vibrant community.

name: facebook clone
description: A Facebook clone focused on responsive UI design and secure user authentication, featuring login, signup, and modern social media-inspired layouts.
